machinery: directional_screen.score_screen (packaged, unmodified) — program_score + composition-matched empirical null + BH-FDR
canonical_recovery: IL2/AIRE/CTLA4 KO → raised program (loss of tolerance); STAT1 KO → lowered (driver); textbook-consistent
interpretation: The directional_screen machinery transfers unmodified to a structurally different independent perturbation dataset (signed membership matrix vs continuous Perturb-seq z-matrix), recovers canonical immune-tolerance directionality, and is reproducible (rho=0.99). Demonstrates the method/tool generalizes beyond the source atlas even where cell-type/species/assay differ.
